category_sources: Official ranger website describes ranger as a console file manager with VI key bindings.
source_facts.description says ranger is a file browser.
display_name_sources: Official ranger website uses the lowercase project name ranger.
docs_sources: Official ranger documentation page links to the official wiki, manpage, README, HACKING file, and source documentation.
Official ranger website identifies the GitHub wiki as the official ranger wiki.
repo_sources: Official ranger documentation page links README and doc files in the ranger/ranger GitHub repository.
Official ranger website links its code to https://github.com/ranger/ranger.
tags_sources: Official ranger documentation page lists features including multi-column display, file previews, file operations, tabs, bookmarks, and Python dependency.
Official ranger website describes a console file manager with VI key bindings.
